sharedPost.text:
Zaproszenie dla widzów TVN i TVN24 na Koncert Charytatywny SIŁA MUZYKI DLA MICHASI, który odbędzie się już 26 czerwca 2026 roku w Piątek o godzinie 17:00 w Domu Kultury Słowian w Szczecinie👍

https://slowianin.org/event/koncert-charytatywny-dla-michaliny-gozdzik/

Celem wydarzenia jest zebranie środków na rehabilitację Michaliny. Niestety koszty leczenia i rehabilitacji są bardzo wysokie, a prowadzona zbiórka od pewnego czasu praktycznie się zatrzymała. Każde udostępnienie informacji o koncercie i zbiórce może realnie pomóc w dotarciu do osób, które zechcą wesprzeć Michalinę.

https://zrzutka.pl/5bvuz8

TVN24+ Fundacja TVN TVN24 TVN UWAGA! TVN Dzień Dobry TVN TVN Fashion Co za tydzień TVN

items.text:
**CASTING CALL **- "PULSE" Short Film // Non-Union

**Compensation**: Unpaid/Volunteer, Lunch and Crafty Provided

**Location**: Vancouver, BC 

**Shoot Date:** Single Day, Late June/Early July 

**Synopsis**: Chris, an inexperienced superhero known as Pulse, decides he must reveal his secret identity to his girlfriend Rachel, but struggles to find the right way, as the two of them debate the methods of this “reckless hero” over dinner.

If interested, please submit headshots, resume and/or demo reel to: **pulseshortfilm.edc@gmail.com**

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: June 24th, 2026

items.text:
Hey everyone! My name is Hannah and I’m on the casting team for a new short film, PRESTO, that is currently looking for CHILD VIOLIN PLAYERS who appear around 7-10 YEARS OLD.

For the speaking roles, THIS IS A PAID OPPORTUNITY! NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED, JUST VIOLIN PROFICIENCY!

SHOOT DATES: 3 days between JULY 16th-
19th.

Location: Vancouver, BC

All details are below. 

If you are a good fit and interested in applying, please email: prestoshortfilm@gmail.com

Also, if you happen to have any potential leads as to where I should look or know anyone who should apply, feel free to DM me. Thank you!

Union Status: UBCP ULB Callback Dates: TBD Shoot: 3 days between July 16-79 2026 Director: Adam Kirschner Producers: Lucy McNulty, Alison Almeida, Ariel Bond, Lauren Jackson Actor (Lead): Alex Rose Casting: Taylor Long & &Hannah Carman'

items.text:
🟣 TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA Z WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! 🟣
🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🔹 OCZEKUJEMY:
🎙️ dobrej dykcji
🎯 dyspozycyjności na próbach we Wrocławiu od sierpnia
🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

📧 Wyślij CV ze zdjęciem:
teatrmlodegowidza@o2.pl
📞 Kontakt: 600 236 767

📌 Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami

items.text:
NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

sharedPost.text:
Tworzymy przestrzeń dla dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych, którzy realizują swoją pasję. 

Bezpieczeństwo to nasz priorytet. 🔐
W naszej bazie aktorów zdjęcia i profile  podopiecznych nie są dostępne dla każdego w sieci. Dostęp do bazy mają wyłącznie zweryfikowani reżyserzy i twórcy projektów. Twoja (lub Twojego dziecka) prywatność jest u nas w 100% bezpieczna.
Chcesz spróbować swoich sił w reklamie, filmie, serialu w profesjonalnych warunkach? Zapraszamy do naszej agencji!

http://www.castella.pl/

items.text:
Hi  I’m a London-based presenter, spokesperson and UGC creator with a clear, natural on-camera presence.

I’ve worked across property presenting, vox pop street interviews, product explainers, founder-style content, webinars, UGC ads and social campaigns. 

My style is warm, articulate and trustworthy, with the ability to make complex ideas feel simple, human and easy to understand.

 

Send me an email - tanya@luckyattitude.co.uk

PAID WORK ONLY, happy to travel

items.text:
ACTRESS WANTED – Norfolk, UK
Looking for a female actress aged 25–30 for a small independent horror/thriller film project.

Age: 25–30

Location: Norfolk, UK

Filming: 1 day

Jully 25 

Payment: £100

Experience is welcome but not essential

This is a cinematic short film project with a dark atmospheric style. Please send a recent photo, acting experience (if any), and contact details.

For more information, send a private message.

Paid role (£100)

We have filmed our first concept teaser to show the direction we are taking with the project

In the future, we will also be looking for additional cast members:

4 male actors (30–40 years old) to play members of a cult.

1 actress (40–45 years old) to play a key witness.

1 male actor (around 60 years old) to play the Chief of Police.

If you are interested in future roles, please get in touch and send a recent photo and any acting experience you may have.

sharedPost.text:
Wir können auch ohne Weiße Boots. Ungern, aber wir können. 😉

Übernächsten Freitag ist es endlich so weit:

Unser 6. Studioalbum wird das Licht der Welt erblicken.

Lange haben wir darauf hingearbeitet, und jetzt können wir es kaum erwarten, diesen Moment mit euch zu teilen.

Die Vorbestellung startet schon bald. Bis dahin halten wir euch natürlich auf dem Laufenden – und vielleicht haben wir bis dahin noch die eine oder andere Überraschung für euch.

Liebe Grüße

Nils & Marco

#NeuesAlbum #Studioalbum #AlbumRelease #Musik #NeueMusik 
Marco Bartz Nils Upahl
📸@jophielphotography

sharedPost.text:
Wenn aus Begegnungen echte Partnerschaften werden… ❤️

Ein Kaffee. Ein Gespräch. Eine gemeinsame Idee.

Und plötzlich berichtet die Ostdeutsche Allgemeine über unseren JEDERMANN 2026. 📰🎭

Genau deshalb liebe ich das, was wir machen:
Nicht gegeneinander. Sondern miteinander.

Ein riesiges DANKE an alle Partner, Sponsoren, Unterstützer, Helfer, Medien, unser unglaubliches Ensemble und natürlich an unser Publikum.

Ohne euch wäre dieses Theaterprojekt nicht das, was es heute ist. ❤️

Jetzt steigt die Vorfreude auf den Sommer 2026!

In Bremen am 04.08. auf der Seebühne - in📍 Weimar | 12.–16. August
Wir sehen uns vor dem Rathaus- am 29.08. in Coburg auf dem Schlossplatz - am 04.09. in Graz auf den Kasematten, Ende Okt. in Dresden im Zirkus Sarrasani und Anfang Nov. in Bayreuth im Friedrichforum. 

www.jedermann-theater.de 

#Jedermann2026 #Theater #OpenAir #BehindTheScenes #show

Cześć.
Na sobotę,  20 czerwca poszukuję młodych ludzi w wieku 22-40 lat do statystowania w Trudnych Sprawach . Eleganccy kobiety i mężczyźni jako pracownicy korporacji . Trzy sceny od godz 14-17. Płatność gotówką po planie. Że względów proceduralnych, proszę osoby tylko z polskim obywatelstwa. Zgłoszenia proszę kierować pod numer telefonu 506499549. 

Zapraszam

items.text:
Casting for female late teens / early 20s - London 

Casting for the role of Bri in Pass To Gain! a 15 min play to be performed at Riverside Studio this weekend following a last minute drop out.

Bri is a student vet that unwittingly finds herself competing in a deathly game show .

We had an actress drop out last minute. Opportunity is unpaid but is part of Burnt Orange Ripe festival and should be a good opportunity to meet lots of people + happy to buy you a pint and cover tube fair.

DM if interested!

items.text:
‘Daisies’ Short Film Casting Call
Hi everyone,

I’m currently producing a short film titled ‘Daisies’, and we’re now casting.

Logline: When their affair is discovered by her violent boyfriend, a man goes on the run with his best friend while the woman he loves faces the consequences of their secret.

More information (full plot, writer’s notes, mood board):

www.writenbystokes.com 

We are casting:

* 2 Female actors (playing age 18–30)

* 2 Male actors (playing age 18–30)

(Midlands-based actors

Food and travel expenses will be provided 

First Shoot

* Date: 25th May 2026

* Location: Birmingham

* Actors: 2 Female

* Time: From 12pm onwards

Second Shoot

* Date: TBC

* Location: Peak District

* Actors: 2 Male

* Time: Full day

A possible third shoot, depending on the other two. 

If interested, please send: 

* Headshot

* Showreel (if available)

* Your location

Email: cjamesstokes19@gmail.com

items.text:
Hello all. I’m looking for an East Asian woman 50+ to play a grandmother in a short student film in London. The film is about greif and love.

It’s a one-day shoot on the 15th of May in East 15 Acting School. This is a low-budget student project, travel covered.

If you’re open to it, I can send details and you can decide if it’s for you.

Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
🌎INTERNATIONAL DANCE COMPETITION GERMANY 🌏
presents the event schedule for the 2026/2027 season:
💎Dance Diamonds💎 October 3–4, 2026, at Stadthalle Kleve. Registration is open now through September 20, 2026: www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟This dance competition is open to amateur dancers ranging from the 10-year-old age category up to the Open age class.
🌟Participation is available in the following categories: Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟The competition encompasses a wide variety of dance styles. Furthermore, it is designed to accommodate performers or dance groups at various levels of preparation.

💎Dance Diamonds Kids💎 December 19–20, 2026, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from October 1, 2026, to December 6, 2026.
www.art-element.de/dance-diamonds
🌟This competition is organized specifically for young performers aged 3 to 12. 🌟Participation takes place in the categories of Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟Additionally, participants are divided into different categories based on their level of preparation, whether they are individual performers or dance groups. 💥"Dance Prodigy"💥 March 6–7, 2027, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from November 1, 2026, to February 10, 2027.
www.art-element.de/danceprodigy
🔥The competition features a unique format, incorporating audiovisual multimedia stage design.
⚡️The project places great emphasis on dance as a performing art; the media-art stage design enhances the dramatic impact of each choreography, presenting the performance through a contemporary aesthetic.
🌟The competition is open to participants of all ages—specifically groups of three or more performers—and showcases a variety of dance styles.
⚡️Participants and dance groups are categorized according to their respective levels of experience and preparation.

🛎Visit www.art-element.de for detailed information about our team, our projects and event programs, and our archives.

✨️If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact us by phone or WhatsApp at 0049-15773131438.
♥️Our team looks forward to your participation in our dance competitions!🏆

sharedPost.text:
Judith Uchechukwu Moghalu is her real name before she adopted the stage name
Judy Austin.
She is from Umuoji in Anambra State. We have two children together. Sometimes I ask myself, ‘Wetin man do man?’
Anytime we were watching Nollywood movies and Yul Edochie appeared on screen, Judy would lose concentration.
She would openly tell me she loved Yul and praise him.
She also used to say that Yul Edochie’s voice reminded her of her uncle, Chinedu.
I have four pieces of evidence that they were dating under my roof.”
- Mr. Obasi, Judy Austin’s former husband, became emotional during an interview as he presented photos and other materials which he says are evidence of their marriage. #trendy #nigeria

The new Casting Calls UK platform is now live and it's FREE to register.

Join here:

appcastingcalls.uk

Built for the UK creative industry:

Talent • Casting Directors • Production Companies • Agents • Crew • Industry Services

Actors, models, presenters, voice artists, filmmakers, photographers, makeup artists, coaches, creatives, and anyone working across TV, film, stage, media, and production — this is for you.

We're right at the beginning of an exciting new chapter, and our community is growing every day. New members, opportunities, casting calls, companies, agents, crew, and industry professionals are joining as we continue to build the UK's newest industry hub.

Joining now gives you the chance to be one of the early members helping shape the platform from day one.

We're also still fine-tuning parts of the platform and adding new tools and features. If you spot something that doesn't look quite right, find a bug, or have an idea for a feature you'd like to see added, we'd love to hear from you.

Simply send your feedback through the Support section inside your account.

Come and be part of Casting Calls UK from the very beginning.

Register FREE today:

appcastingcalls.uk

items.text:
**EXTRAS NEEDED – Background Artists | 20-24th June 2026 | Birmingham* **

***Film Name* : Project 79**

***Shoot dates*: 20th, 21st, 23rd & 24th June 2026 *( it’s continuity can attend all dates or mention dates can attend )***

***Age Range:* 18–70 years**

items.text:
Every Player Had A Plan

Power Rarely Announces Itself. It Doesn't Need To. True Influence Exists Quietly, Hidden Behind Calm Smiles, Calculated Decisions, And Perfect Timing. In A World Where Everyone Believes They Are In Control, The Most Dangerous Person Is Usually The One Speaking The Least.

This Cinematic Character Represents A Master Strategist Operating In The Shadows Of Luxury And High Stakes. Standing Inside An Exclusive Monaco Penthouse Overlooking The Mediterranean Coastline, He Watches The Game Unfold Around Him. Poker Chips Cover The Table. Hidden Documents Wait To Change Everything. Every Player Believes They Understand The Rules. None Of Them Realize The Outcome Was Decided Long Before They Sat Down.

“EVERY PLAYER HAD A PLAN / HE OWNED THE TABLE” Is More Than A Caption. It Is A Story About Intelligence, Patience, And The Power Of Staying Three Steps Ahead. While Others Focused On Winning A Hand, He Controlled The Entire Game. While Others Gambled With Chance, He Gambled With Certainty.

The Luxury Atmosphere, Golden Reflections, And Suspenseful Thriller Lighting Transform This Ultra-Realistic 4K HDR Poster Into A Sophisticated Hollywood Mystery. Every Shadow Hides A Secret. Every Card Holds A Clue. Every Decision Carries Consequences.

Some Men Play The Game.

Some Men Change The Rules.

And A Rare Few Own The Table Before The First Card Is Dealt.

#LuxuryThriller #Mastermind #CinematicPoster #HighStakes #ViralPost

items.text:
The Land Needed A Warrior

Every Nation Has Moments When Its Future Hangs By A Thread. Times When Ordinary Courage Is Not Enough. Times When A Warrior Must Rise To Defend More Than A Kingdom—To Defend A Legacy.

This Cinematic Character Represents The Spirit Of Ancient Scotland, A Fearless Champion Forged By Harsh Lands, Endless Battles, And Unbreakable Loyalty. Standing Among The Mist-Covered Highlands, Surrounded By Ancient Castles And Gathering Armies, He Holds A Massive Claymore Sword As If It Were An Extension Of His Own Will. Blue War Paint Marks His Face, Not As Decoration, But As A Symbol Of Heritage, Pride, And Defiance.

“THE LAND NEEDED A WARRIOR / HE ANSWERED THE CALL” Is More Than A Caption. It Is A Story About Duty, Sacrifice, And The Courage To Stand When Others Cannot. While Many Feared The Coming Storm, He Walked Directly Into It. While Others Waited For A Hero, He Became One.

The Fog-Covered Highlands, Ancient Fortresses, And Dramatic Fantasy-War Atmosphere Transform This Ultra-Realistic 4K HDR Poster Into An Epic Historical Adventure. Every Gust Of Wind, Every Reflection On The Steel Armor, And Every Shadow Across The Battlefield Reinforces The Feeling Of A Legend Being Born.

Heroes Are Not Chosen By Destiny.

They Are Chosen By Their Actions.

And When The Call Came, He Never Hesitated.

#WarriorSpirit #EpicFantasy #CinematicPoster #ScottishLegend #ViralPost

items.text:
The Frontier Changed Men

The Frontier Was Never Kind. It Tested Courage, Patience, And Character Every Single Day. Harsh Winters, Endless Roads, And Unforgiving Mountains Turned Dreamers Into Survivors. Many Men Arrived Looking For Opportunity. Few Left The Same.

This Cinematic Character Represents The Spirit Of The Old West—Steady, Resilient, And Unbreakable. Standing Beside His Horse In A Snow-Covered Mountain Town, He Watches Another Storm Roll Across The Horizon. Lanterns Glow Through Falling Snow While The Town Around Him Struggles Against The Cold. Yet His Expression Remains Calm, As If He Has Already Survived Every Challenge The Frontier Could Offer.

“THE FRONTIER CHANGED MEN / NOT HIM” Is More Than A Caption. It Is A Story About Staying True To Yourself In A World Constantly Trying To Change You. While Others Lost Their Way, He Held Onto His Principles. While Others Broke Under Pressure, He Endured.

The Warm Lantern Light, Snow-Covered Streets, And Rugged Western Atmosphere Transform This Ultra-Realistic 4K HDR Poster Into A Timeless Frontier Epic. Every Snowflake, Every Wooden Building, And Every Shadow Tells The Story Of A Man Who Refused To Be Defined By Circumstances.

The Frontier Tested Everyone.

But Some Men Were Built For The Test.

#WesternLegend #FrontierSpirit #CinematicPoster #EpicStory #ViralPost

items.previewTitle:
CASTING CALL - CAMDEN FRINGE 2026

Off the Record Theatre is seeking two female actors to join the all-female cast of our debut production, “Un/filtered,” for the Camden Fringe this August.

The play is a modern take on Alice Gerstenberg’s “Overtones.”

Details:
• Performance Dates: Evenings of August 9th, 10th, and 12th
• Basis: profit share

Required Availability (Times TBC):
• Sunday, July 5th: Read-through and analysis
• Tuesday, August 4th: Tech rehearsal

Proposed Rehearsal Dates:
Rehearsals will be mostly evenings, with potential for daytime sessions on Fridays (subject to space availability). Please flag any unavailable dates/times in your application.
• July: 7th, 8th, 17th, 21st, 24th, 31st
• August: 5th, 7th

Please see character breakdowns attached.

If interested, email us and we will send auditions sides to you. 

Submission Deadline: Sunday, June 28th.

For more information please email offtherecordtheatre@gmail.com.

We look forward to seeing your audition!

items.text:
CASTING: Mum role for children’s music video — London
Looking for a warm, natural actress/supporting artist to play the mum in a children’s music video for an 8-year-old artist.

Role: Mum / mother figure

Age range: 30–45

Shoot: London (Eltham), half day or full day

Date: 4th July 

Fee: Paid, please send your rate

Scene: Short family moment where mum reacts proudly to her son losing his first tooth / growing up fast

Look: Warm, natural, stylish, family-friendly

Requirements: Comfortable working around children, able to sign release form, previous screen experience preferred

Please DM with:

.Recent photo

.Short acting/showreel clip if available

.Location

.Availability

.Half-day/full-day rate

# **CASTING CALL - Short Film** 
## Male, early 20s, hearing BSL user

Logline: A trans-girl lies about being deaf in order to befriend a non-speaking BSL user.

**Casting call:**

**Grey **- a non-speaking, hearing BSL user, he's timid and naive, he can't speak due to surgical trauma as a child. He falls for the main character but it's unrequited.

**Production information:**

•⁠  ⁠Paid job

•⁠  ⁠⁠London based

•⁠  ⁠⁠Shot in: Ealing, Crouch End and Kennington

•⁠  ⁠⁠3 days work

•⁠  ⁠⁠Dates 29, 30 July 1 August

•⁠  ⁠⁠Catering provided

**Apply here:**
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3ra2JX-Z_q64e81ety_TS0-kxoCqelBH7M2DdF5p6KDnEiA/viewform?usp=publish-editor](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3ra2JX-Z_q64e81ety_TS0-kxoCqelBH7M2DdF5p6KDnEiA/viewform?usp=publish-editor)

For further information, please **contact**:
[gigi.jacques.va@gmail.com](mailto:gigi.jacques.va@gmail.com)

items.text:
**TV & FILM ACTING SUMMER SCHOOLS – NOW BOOKING! 🎭**

Looking for a Summer School that offers more than just a week of fun? At Meladrama Acting School & Chaos Actors Management, young performers will spend their summer developing performance skills and industry knowledge whilst working alongside professionals who actively work in television, film and theatre.

Whether your child already attends performing arts classes, is represented by an agent, is preparing for drama school auditions, or simply loves performing, our Summer Schools are designed to challenge, inspire and develop young talent.

🎥 PLUS the opportunity to film professionally shot, Spotlight-suitable footage for showreels and profiles (no extra charge!)

Many young actors struggle to find strong, age-appropriate footage for Spotlight and casting submissions. Throughout the week, students will have opportunities to work on camera and create material suitable for use in professional portfolios.

Led by professional actor Melanie Ash and supported by Leo Ashton (currently filming Waterloo Road and known for House of the Dragon, The Bay and Deep Water), students will benefit from genuine industry experience alongside a fun, supportive and inclusive environment.

📍 PRESTON & CHORLEY
3rd–7th August 2026
Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Preston

📍 WARRINGTON
10th–14th August 2026
St Wilfrid's Parish Hall, Church Lane, Grappenhall, Warrington WA4 3EP

📍 WIGAN
28th–31st July 2026
Worsley Hall, Bramble House, 8 Broom Road, Wigan WN5 9QE

Suitable for ages 5–17.

Whether your child wants to pursue acting professionally or simply develop confidence and creativity, we'd love to welcome them this summer.

🎟 Places are limited.

Book here:
[[https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/](https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/)](https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/)

🎬‼️CASTING CALL ‼️🎬
We are looking for experienced jet ski driver who can film high-quality video content on a freelance/outsourced basis for one of our projects.

Preferred locations include Greece, Bali, Thailand, Spain, and other sunny coastal destinations with beautiful ocean scenery.

If you have access to a jet ski, experience with filming, and can capture dynamic, high-quality footage, we'd love to hear from you.

💸Paid

📩 dm me for more details

items.text:
Now casting
Casting a 3-4 year old girl actress for one short scene no dialogue walking in a park. This is a student / indie film- NO PAY but actors will receive IMDb and screen credits. Looking for preferably blonde or lighter tone hair and either hazel or green eyes if possible. Mainly looking for a sweet face with big eyes and cute personality.

WHERE: FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES / SAN FERNANDO VALLEY AREA.

WHAT: One short scene (the ending of the movie) a little girl and a grandpa in a grass field holding hands walking in the sunset.

SYNOPSIS:

“Unforgettable” is a story about hope, courage and the determination of one woman’s journey of the impossible. Through this true story, we learn how one-woman refusal to give up a dream would allow her to receive unusual confirmations from beyond and how a loving song showed her signs of hope along the way. A true story of synchronicity and love between a grandfather and a very special song.

If you know someone who would fit this role please DM me! Looking to film sometime between now and August.

Casting immediately for two of my 10-Minute Plays, The F Word and El Sereno Sound, part of the Brisk Festival 2026 Aug/Sept in Santa Monica

1- Trans Woman in her late 20’s - 30’s for The F-Word.

2- Looking for a female actor with strong vocal and accapella abilities for my play called El Sereno Sound.

All details and more info on flyers.
Rehearsals start next week.

items.text:
AKTORZY, EPIZODYŚCI, STATYŚCI!!!
Firma Outset Films poszukuje NOWYCH TWARZY do serialu Gliniarze.

Poszukujemy osób o każdym typie urody. Mile widziane osoby wysportowane, z tatuażami, kolczykami oraz wszyscy, którzy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerą.

🎬 Jeśli marzysz o występie w serialu i chcesz zobaczyć, jak wygląda praca na planie filmowym, zgłoś się do nas!

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać poprzez formularz na naszej stronie: https://www.outsetfilms.pl/casting01

items.text:
‼️ Uwaga GÓRNY ŚLĄSK‼️
🎬 Serial fabularny (kryminalny) | PROJEKT: ŚLĄSK

❇️ KOGO SZUKAMY:  mężczyzn (w wieku 20-40 lat), jako klientów klubu nocnego (2 sceny).

📍 GDZIE:  w Katowicach (5 min spacerem od dworca PKP).

📅 KIEDY:  23.06 (wtorek) – plan dzienny (2 sceny).

💰 WYNAGRODZENIE:  200 zł netto (umowa o dzieło) → płatne gotówką po planie.

—

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA wyślij:

📲 WhatsApp / SMS: +48 660 543 967

📩 e-mail: 123cast.serial@gmail.com

📌 Tytuł zgłoszenia: „Klient (23.06.2026)”

W mailu / komunikatorze podaj wszystkie poniższe dane, dokładnie wg. tej formatki ⬇️:

• imię i nazwisko

• telefon

• e-mail

• miejsce zamieszkania

• data urodzenia

• wzrost / waga

• rozmiar obuwia (EU)

📸 Dołącz 2 aktualne zdjęcia (w mailu jako załącznik):

* portret;

* sylwetka.

Zdjęcia warto zrobić telefonem:

❌ bez innych osób w kadrze, bez okularów, bez nakrycia głowy.

—

⚠️ Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

Do zobaczenia na planie. 🎬

—￼

items.text:
CASTING – POSZUKUJEMY MODELKI 45+ DO APLIKACJI O ZDROWIU

Do realizacji materiałów wideo z ćwiczeniami dla aplikacji wspierającej zdrowie szyi i kręgosłupa poszukujemy modelki:

Kobieta 45+

Wymagania:

• jasne włosy (średniej długości lub dłuższe)

• zadbana aparycja, czysta skóra, brak tatuaży

• wysportowana, szczupła sylwetka

• dobra postawa ciała

Mile widziane doświadczenie związane z fitnessem lub aktywnością fizyczną, ponieważ ważne będzie technicznie poprawne wykonywanie ćwiczeń.

Ćwiczenia nie są wymagające fizycznie – aplikacja skupia się na zdrowiu szyi i pleców.

📍 Warszawa

📅 3 dni zdjęciowe na początku lipca

Przed zdjęciami odbędą się również 2 dni prób (po ok. 6 godzin każda).

💰 Projekt płatny.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać WYŁĄCZNIE na adres:

casting.shootins.warsaw@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy załączyć:

• zdjęcie dobrze widocznej twarzy

• zdjęcie całej sylwetki

• krótką informację o sobie

• informację o swojej dostępności w terminie pomiędzy 29 czerwca a 12 lipca

Referencje zamieszczam poniżej.

items.text:
**Może czas wykorzystać swoją energię w nowym formacie? ✨**

Szukamy osób z doświadczeniem w animacji, eventach, obsłudze klienta, sporcie, tańcu lub podobnych obszarach.

Jeśli dobrze czujesz się w kontakcie z ludźmi i potrafisz tworzyć atmosferę — **możesz odnaleźć się w roli instruktora ruchu i tańca w Arthur Murray!**

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia w prowadzeniu zajęć tanecznych — wszystkiego nauczymy Cię krok po kroku.

**Co zyskujesz?**
🎓 pełne szkolenie od początku
🌍 rozwój w międzynarodowej sieci
👥 klientów od studia
📈 jasną ścieżkę rozwoju
💃 codzienny kontakt z ludźmi, ruchem i emocjami
💰 wynagrodzenie 6500–9000 zł

📍 Wrocław / Warszawa

**Brzmi jak coś dla Ciebie?**
📩 Wyślij CV: arthurmurray.hr@gmail.com
📞 WhatsApp: +48 574 780 210

items.text:
Die Aufmerksamkeitsspanne und das Unterhaltungniveau haben sich in den letzten 20 Jahren drastisch verändert.
Dies bedeutet für uns Trainer, dass unsere Methoden sich weiter entwickeln müssen, in Bezug auf Training mit Jugendlichen.
Da ich seit über 25 Jahren Kampfsport unterrichte, konnte ich dies sehr gut mit erleben.
Ich finde es gibt ein Zitat, was das Ganze sehr gut schildert: „entweder gehst du mit der Zeit oder du gehst mit der Zeit“.
Während des Trainings läuft bei mir grundsätzlich keine Musik, damit die Kids sich auf das Training vollständig konzentrieren.
Jedoch wenn wir unsere Langstreckenläufer machen, nehme ich ab und zu - nicht immer - meine Lautsprecher mit um den Kids ein Gefühl von Party machen, im gesunden Rahmen zu vermitteln.
Junge Menschen sehnen sich nach Aufmerksamkeit und hierfür machen sie mittlerweile die skurrilsten Sachen, um diese Aufmerksamkeit zu erlangen.
Aus pädagogischer Sicht ist es sehr wertvoll, während einer hoch konzentrierten Tätigkeit nebenbei Musik laufen zu lassen.
In unserem Fall sind die Kinder gestern mit den Eltern zusammen 6 km vor dem Training gelaufen und ich ließ einige meiner Lieblingslieder laufen 😉 (Wortspiel)
Etwas melodisches, nicht zu aggressiv, einfach ein positiver Sommervibe, der die Trainingsintensität unterstreicht.
Hierbei geht es drum ein Statement zu setzen, dass junge Menschen cool sind, wenn sie etwas für ihre Gesundheit tun und dies auch noch vor den Augen der ganzen Stadt.
Und genauso funktioniert es.
Es gibt viele perspektivlose Jugendliche, die auf Parkbänke ihre kostbare Zeit vergeuden und nicht wissen, was sie mit sich anfangen sollen.
Und dann gibt es uns; Menschen, die damit auffallen, etwas was eigentlich das Selbstverständlichste auf der Welt sein sollte.
Anstatt negative Schlagzeilen aus den Nachrichten zu rezitieren und sich seine Welt dunkler auszumalen als sie ist.
Vermitteln wir eine Botschaft von konstruktiv kollektivem Handeln.

Don‘t talk the talk, run the run 🎵 

#sensaisam #sensai_sam #sensailino #sensaisamontour #teamsensaisam

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Die Aufmerksamkeitsspanne und das Unterhaltungniveau haben sich in den letzten 20 Jahren drastisch verändert.
Dies bedeutet für uns Trainer, dass unsere Methoden sich weiter entwickeln müssen, in Bezug auf Training mit Jugendlichen.
Da ich seit über 25 Jahren Kampfsport unterrichte, konnte ich dies sehr gut mit erleben.
Ich finde es gibt ein Zitat, was das Ganze sehr gut schildert: „entweder gehst du mit der Zeit oder du gehst mit der Zeit“.
Während des Trainings läuft bei mir grundsätzlich keine Musik, damit die Kids sich auf das Training vollständig konzentrieren.
Jedoch wenn wir unsere Langstreckenläufer machen, nehme ich ab und zu - nicht immer - meine Lautsprecher mit um den Kids ein Gefühl von Party machen, im gesunden Rahmen zu vermitteln.
Junge Menschen sehnen sich nach Aufmerksamkeit und hierfür machen sie mittlerweile die skurrilsten Sachen, um diese Aufmerksamkeit zu erlangen.
Aus pädagogischer Sicht ist es sehr wertvoll, während einer hoch konzentrierten Tätigkeit nebenbei Musik laufen zu lassen.
In unserem Fall sind die Kinder gestern mit den Eltern zusammen 6 km vor dem Training gelaufen und ich ließ einige meiner Lieblingslieder laufen 😉 (Wortspiel)
Etwas melodisches, nicht zu aggressiv, einfach ein positiver Sommervibe, der die Trainingsintensität unterstreicht.
Hierbei geht es drum ein Statement zu setzen, dass junge Menschen cool sind, wenn sie etwas für ihre Gesundheit tun und dies auch noch vor den Augen der ganzen Stadt.
Und genauso funktioniert es.
Es gibt viele perspektivlose Jugendliche, die auf Parkbänke ihre kostbare Zeit vergeuden und nicht wissen, was sie mit sich anfangen sollen.
Und dann gibt es uns; Menschen, die damit auffallen, etwas was eigentlich das Selbstverständlichste auf der Welt sein sollte.
Anstatt negative Schlagzeilen aus den Nachrichten zu rezitieren und sich seine Welt dunkler auszumalen als sie ist.
Vermitteln wir eine Botschaft von konstruktiv kollektivem Handeln.

Don‘t talk the talk, run the run 🎵 

#sensaisam #sensai_sam #sensailino #sensaisamontour #teamsensaisam

items.text: We're searching for an extraordinary actress to lead our upcoming feature film, Family Reunion. This role calls for authenticity, emotional depth, and a commanding presence. If you believe you, or someone you know, could be the heart of this story, I'd love to hear from you. Please send your materials via DM for further details. Sharing is greatly appreciated.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FAMILY REUNION HEMTOGETHER THER, UPDESTROYING EVERYTHING, SILVERWOOD PICTURES PRESENTS CASTING CALL We are searching for our LEAD ACTRESS THA BEAMA FOR POWERFUL NEW FEATURE FILM WE ARE LOOKING FOR AN EXTRAORDINARY OLDER WOMAN THE MOVIE reunion AGE: ABOVE family nightmare secrets broken relationships, and truths weekend One house. everything. YEARS OLD STRONG ACTING EXPERIENCE EMOTIONAL DEPTH AND PRESENCE ABLET PORTRAY STRENGTH, VULNERABILITY AND COMPLEXITY SHE IS THE HEART OF THE STORY CHOICES SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS RECENT PHOTO (PORTRAIT FULL BODY) ACTING RESUME SHOWREEL SAMPLE SCENE CONTACT INFORMATION VAILABLE) TENTATIVE RELEASE 2027 STORY APERFORNANCETMEYLNVESPTAKIGA NEVER APERFORMANCE EMOTIONS FAMILY MPACT'

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL - Short Film** 
## Male, early 20s, hearing BSL user

Logline: A trans-girl lies about being deaf in order to befriend a non-speaking BSL user.

**Casting call:**

**Grey **- a non-speaking, hearing BSL user, he's timid and naive, he can't speak due to surgical trauma as a child. He falls for the main character but it's unrequited.

**Production information:**

•⁠  ⁠Paid job

•⁠  ⁠⁠London based

•⁠  ⁠⁠Shot in: Ealing, Crouch End and Kennington

•⁠  ⁠⁠3 days work

•⁠  ⁠⁠Dates 29, 30 July 1 August

•⁠  ⁠⁠Catering provided

**Apply here:**
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3ra2JX-Z_q64e81ety_TS0-kxoCqelBH7M2DdF5p6KDnEiA/viewform?usp=publish-editor](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3ra2JX-Z_q64e81ety_TS0-kxoCqelBH7M2DdF5p6KDnEiA/viewform?usp=publish-editor)

For further information, please **contact**:
[gigi.jacques.va@gmail.com](mailto:gigi.jacques.va@gmail.com)

items.text:
Hey everyone,

​I’m Correy, a San Jose-based filmmaker and photographer and freelance music composer, and I’m looking to connect with a nearby crew/creative team to help me bring my screenplay, "Who I Was," to life.

​The Vibe: It’s a gritty, atmospheric 1980s period drama set right here in the South Bay—before the tech boom changed everything. Think neon-shadowed streets, old-school valley grit, and high stakes.

​Because of my background in analog photography, I have a very specific visual look in mind for this—high-contrast, cinematic, and deeply grounded in our local history. I’m currently building a visual lookbook and getting the pitch materials ready to take to production companies.

​Who I’m looking to connect with:

​Cinematographers / DPs who love playing with vintage aesthetics, shadows, and low-light street photography.

​Producers / ADs who know how to navigate local logistics and want to help build a project from the ground up.

​Grip & Electric / Crew who want to work on a stylish, character-driven local project.

​Actors & Creatives who just want to network and talk shop about South Bay filmmaking.

​Whether you want to collaborate on a proof-of-concept short, help build the lookbook, or just grab a coffee in town and talk cinema, let's connect.

​Drop a comment or shoot me a DM with your portfolio or what you do. Let's make something dope for the 408!

​Subject: Looking for a local crew to bring an 80s San Jose period drama to life 🎬🎞️

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
Proud to announce that Tammy Doyle and I have been working on a new short film titled 'Breaking the Cycle'. 

Based on true events, ‘Breaking the Cycle’ tells the story of Mia, a young mother trapped in a volatile relationship with her partner, Darren whiling caring for her newborn baby Conor. As his behaviour worsens, Mia endures physically and emotionally, taking it for the sake of their child. However, when the abuse intensifies and now threatens young Conor, Mia knows she must act. Taking a chance. Leaving the only life she has known and risking everything for the sake of herself and more importantly her child. Making those important steps towards breaking the generational cycle of abuse. 

After some time prepping, we are now ready to cast and seek crew for our short film.

We are looking for a small crew to help on shooting days in departments such as camera, lighting, sound, costume, make up and production assistants. 

Below features the list of characters we are looking to cast:

 

MIA (Early to Mid-20s) - Female

A young mother trying to survive an abusive relationship while caring for her newborn son. Physically and emotionally drained, she feels isolated and unsupported, yet possesses a quiet strength and resilience. Her love for her baby ultimately gives her the courage to escape and rebuild her life.

DARREN (Late 20s) - Male

A volatile, controlling, and increasingly dangerous man. Struggling with alcohol and drug abuse, his behaviour swings between intimidation and violence. He is deeply insecure and becomes jealous of the attention given to his own child, leading to escalating abuse.

DARREN’S FATHER RICHARD (50s–60s) – Male

Dismissive and self-interested, and an abuser himself, he downplays the seriousness of the situation. More concerned about maintaining access to his grandson than Mia’s safety, he represents a generation that avoids confronting abuse directly.

MIA’S SISTER DONNA (20s-30s) – Female (NON-SPEAKING)

Must be able to Drive

Practical and supportive, Mia’s sister helps her escape despite the risks involved. While not deeply involved emotionally, she steps up when it matters, providing a way out when Mia needs it most.

This is a micro-budget project currently, but we are in the process of seeking funding. However, until then, the project is UNPAID, however travel expenses and catering will be covered at the very least. 

If you are interested in the project, please send your applications to shaundaly2510@gmail.com with name, character you would like to audition for or crew role you are interested in, head shots and showreels, past work and other media would be greatly welcomed as well. Deadline for Applications for both Cast and Crew will be on Midnight of July 10th, 2026. With auditions to be held on 15th and 16th July with one day on the Wirral and the other in Liverpool City Centre. More details will be given closer to the time.

items.text:
**THE SESSION - VFS STUDENT FILM - NON-UNION** 

Hello, I am Anastasia and I am the Line Producer for “The Session,” a student short film with Vancouver Film School. 

The premise is Niri, a psychologically fractured taxi driver under the investigation of murder, undergoes psychiatric sessions that loosens his grip on reality as he gets flashbacks - blood spreading on the floor and his father’s abuse. He sees himself killing his psychiatrist, Dr. Orms, with the very pen she is using during their session. However, she hands him a diagnosis and says he’s free to go, ending the session calmly. As he exits, Detective Fareth greets him like an old friend, yet now Niri is wearing a completely different outfit with the paper in his hand being blank - revealing that he was never free, but a psychiatric patient all along.

We are accepting submissions for all of the following roles:

**NIRI**
Male, 25-35 y.o., All ethnicities
A man misdiagnosed with schizophrenia actually suffers from DID-- two distinct identities split from his trauma: his gentle, vulnerable self and an alter driven by anger and pain. Subtle clues like memory loss, disconnection, and a history of trauma are woven into him. Deep down Niri knows the truth, but paralyzed by guilt and fear of losing control entirely, he hides it from everyone aware that whoever finds out could become the next victim.

**DR. ORMS**
Female, 40-55 y.o., All ethnicities
Dr. Katerin Orms is a calm, maternal psychiatrist who represents the last remnant of Niri's sanity, confident she can cure him. Her expertise becomes her downfall; she diagnoses him with schizophrenia but fails to see the truth he's hiding. Ironically in her case, the most experienced person in the room is the one most blind to what's really happening.

**DETECTIVE FARETH**
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
A lifetime of catching criminals has left Fareth with little patience and no apologies. He operates outside the law not out of malice, but because he knows pressure works. Decades of experience haven't slowed him down; they've just made him colder, sharper, and harder to argue with.

**THE SUSPECT**
Male, 20-30 y.o., All ethnicities
The suspect is nobody, a random guy brought into custody (not entirely legally) by the detective Fareth to answer some questions. Little did the suspect know, is that the detective just made him his twisted objective. The suspect is terrified and very easy to read. From what we hear it seems that it wasn’t his first time in custody, but we could easily deduce that he didn’t want to stay there for long-- this is why he’s agitated and afraid.

**NIRI’S FATHER **
Male, 40-60 y.o., All ethnicities
Though there is no dialogue for this character, The father of Niri was a closed minded man, with an old and retrograde worldview, he served and experienced the second world war as commander, but lost all his glory and respect at the end of it. He was brainwashed with a military mindset and had PTSD. He was violent, unpredictable and angry, so he unloaded all his frustration and what he considered injustice on his innocent son

We are accepting actors from the greater Vancouver area, which is also where we will be filming.

**IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN ONE OF THESE ROLES**, please send your name, a headshot, a resume, a demo reel, and the role you are auditioning for to ***sessionwdr.o@gmail.com***. Please send by **Tuesday, June 24th, 09:00AM**. 

Chosen actors will then be requested self tapes on Tuesday, June 24th, which will be sent to the production email with more instructions in the initial request. Self tapes are due and callback requests are sent out Friday, June 26th. In-person callbacks will be held on Sunday, June 28th. **We will be shooting July 15th to July 17th. **

This is a Non-Union, Non-paid 10 minute film shot across 3 days. On set meals are fully covered. IMDB Credits provided. We will release the film online and will screen the film to applied festivals.

**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. Audition submission deadline- 27th March.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

Tyler- 25-45, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 11th and 12th July. mornings shift only. 

Vijay's Date- 28-38, Any ethnicity, large-bodied/curvy, shoot on 11th July. 

Lady in Bar- 22-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th July. 2-3 lines 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown 

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -  **Girls' Night Out Short Film
## **We are casting for Girls’ Night Out, a cinematic short film about five Black women from five African nations navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC. Each woman carries something invisible into the night. What they find in each other is what no institution could provide. The film is strictly volunteer based, targeting festival submissions. This is a portfolio piece for everyone involved.**

**We are currently looking for:**
**LEAD ROLES — All five must be women of African descent (OPEN TO ALL BLACK ACTRESSES)**

**AMARA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Sharp, always in motion, a code-switcher. Works in marketing and communications. Must be comfortable switching between Nigerian pidgin and a neutral Canadian accent.**

**NIA – Western African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Medical student. Exhausted and brilliant.**

**ZURI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. The anchor. Decisive, warm, composed. Social worker. Needs to know how to drive**

**IMANI – Southern African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Playful, chaotic, observant. DJ.**

**TONI – East African woman, late 20s to early 30s. Athletic build. A bit of a tomboy. Software engineer. Private.**

**SUPPORTING ROLES & EXTRAS**

**We are intentionally casting to reflect the demographic reality of Vancouver, a city built on Indigenous land and home to one of the most diverse populations in the world. We are particularly interested in hearing from:**

**Black performers**
**Indigenous performers**
**East Asian and South Asian performers**
**White performers**

**For supporting and background roles, all backgrounds are welcome to submit.**

**No acting experience required. If you have never acted before but feel connected to one of these characters please submit. We are looking for truth, not technique.**

**This is an unpaid production (screen credit provided). Food will be provided on set. Some scenes require emotional depth, multiple takes, and reshoots.**

**To submit please send the following to: gnothefilm@gmail.com**

**Headshot or clear selfie**
**Short video introducing yourself (30–60 seconds, just talk to us, INCLUDE: NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION UNION STATUS & CULTURAL BACKGROUND)**
**Reel or any acting experience if available**
**Which role you are submitting for**
**Your contact information and location**

**Filming in Vancouver, BC Late August 2026. Even if you are not submitting, please share this with someone who might be. Every share helps us find the right people.**

Serial Uroczysko.

WROCŁAW.

Na wtorek 23.06, 6.07 (poniedziałek) i 7.07 (wtorek) szukamy aktorów do ról:

-Klara – ok. 25 lat, stereotypowa modelka, marząca o karierze
aktorskiej. Bezpośrednia, trochę próżna i skupiona
na wyglądzie, niezbyt inteligentna.

-Krystian – 22 lata, gej,model uczestniczący w pokazie,
przystojny, niezbyt dojrzały. Dla utrzymania szczupłej sylwetki sięga
po niebezpieczne środki odchudzające.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres mailowy:

igor.edwinfilm@gmail.com

Hasło: Klara lub Krystian(w zależności od roli)

(imię i nazwisko, data urodzenia, miejsce zamieszkania, szkoła aktorska, aktualna fotografia, numer telefonu, wizytówka aktorska, link do demo/selftape)

Zapewniamy honorarium, hotel i zwrot kosztów przejazdu.

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

Prosimy o NIE wysyłanie informacji na priv i nie zglłaszanie sie pod postem.

Nie odpowiadamy na takie zgłoszenia.

Zapraszamy.

Agencja Aktorska Edwin Film.

items.text:
🎬 MA SHORT FILM CASTING CALL - ACTORS/CREW NEEDED!

Hi everyone, I’m Scarlett! I’m a masters Student doing Drama Production for Film at Uni of Salford & I’m looking for actors & a small crew to be involved in my Short Film ‘The Perfect Break-up’! 🎥 

Looking for:

🎭 ACTORS:
1 Female lead
1 Male lead
2 Male side roles
1 Open Gender side role
—
🧚🏻‍♀️ CREW:
1 Experienced Camera Operator
1 Sound recordist
1x Lighting Technician
1x Runner - Help with Equipment & Crew 

📽️ FILMING:

Locations - Salford & Manchester

2-3 Filming days - 1 full day, 2 half day

🗓️ Dates: TBC - July

📖 Logline: When a couple finishing university turn to a clinical, conversation simulator to script the “perfect break-up”, they must fight to reclaim their humanity from the software turning them into detached, robotic control freaks.

If you’re interested please get in touch with me via email:

💌 s.g.spencer@edu.salford.ac.uk

Actors - please send your showreel/past projects and the role you’re interested in!

Crew - please send examples of previous work, or projects you have been a part of & which team role you’d be interested in!

This is UNPAID, but credit will be given & footage provided for showreels & portfolios 🎞️💼

This is a MA student production at Uni of Salford, Manchester. 

I look forward to hearing from you! 

#castingcall #actorswanted #ukactors #FilmCasting #shortfilmcasting #ManchesterActors #castingcallsuk #castingcallmanchester

items.text:
Hi 👋 I’m a London-based presenter, spokesperson and UGC creator with a clear, natural on-camera presence.

I’ve worked across property presenting, vox pop street interviews, product explainers, founder-style content, webinars, UGC ads and social campaigns. My style is warm, articulate and trustworthy, with the ability to make complex ideas feel simple, human and easy to understand. 

Send me an email - tanya@luckyattitude.co.uk

PAID WORK ONLY, happy to travel

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – MA STUDENT SHORT FILM “STATIC” 🎬
We are currently casting for STATIC, a contemplative drama set in the South Wales valleys exploring loneliness, missed opportunities, and human connection.

📍 Filming Location: Cardiff, Wales
📅 Shoot Dates: 13–16 July 2026
🎭 Audition Date: 27 June 2026
📍 University of South Wales (Cardiff Campus)
🎥 Self-tapes are welcome.

Roles Available:
- TOM (Lead)
Male, playing age 28–35
A radio engineer who feels trapped in routine, longing for connection and change. South Wales accent preferred. Driving licence required.

- EIRA (Lead)
Female, playing age 25–32
Warm, perceptive, and quietly carrying uncertainty about her future. Open to all accents.

✨ We are looking for actors who enjoy subtle, naturalistic performances and grounded realism.
🍽️ Meals will be provided during filming.
🚗 Travel expenses within Cardiff will be covered.

For further information or to submit your interest, please contact:
📧 23121074@students.southwales.ac.uk

This is an MA Film Production at the University of South Wales.

#CastingCall #ActorCall #SouthWalesActors #CardiffActors #StudentFilm #ShortFilm #WelshFilm #CastingWales #UKActors #FilmCasting

A radio engineer who feels trapped in routine, longing for connection and change. South Wales accent preferred. Driving licence required.

- EIRA (Lead)
Female, playing age 25–32
Warm, perceptive, and quietly carrying uncertainty about her future. Open to all accents.

✨ We are looking for actors who enjoy subtle, naturalistic performances and grounded realism.
🍽️ Meals will be provided during filming.
🚗 Travel expenses within Cardiff will be covered.

For further information or to submit your interest, please contact:
📧 23121074@students.southwales.ac.uk

This is an MA Film Production at the University of South Wales.

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Die Bühne Weinviertel bringt das bekannte Theaterstück „Der Bockerer“  im Sommer 2026 als Wiederaufnahme auf die Freiluftbühne im historischen Brandlhof in Radlbrunn. Die Hauptrolle des Wiener Fleischhauers Karl Bockerer übernimmt Intendant Christoph Stich, der unserer Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs dazu ausführlich Antwort stand.

items.previewDescription: „Ich kann es nicht vergessen, wie schwer war deine Hand........Ivy...

sharedPost.text:
Die körperlichen Verletzungen waren schlimm. Doch die seelischen Wunden waren viel tiefer.

Heute weiß ich: Es gibt ein
Leben nach dem Schmerz. 
Ein Leben voller Stärke, Freiheit, Hoffnung und echter Liebe zu sich selbst.
Wenn du gerade kämpfst, gib nicht auf. Hinter der schwersten Zeit kann etwas Wundervolles auf dich warten ♥️🙌.

Stopp gegen jeglicher Gewalt 🛑

items.text:
Poszukuje Mamy z synkiem w wieku od około 3 do 4 lat do sesji video produktu dla dzieci, dla polskiej marki Rabbit & Friends

Sesja (krótkie video -do online- promujące nowy produkt) w dniu 26 czerwca (piątek) lub 27 czerwca (sobota) - dzień do ustalenia, w Warszawie - Targówek. Umowa na wizerunek zarówno dziecka jak i Mamy bezterminowo i bez ograniczeń terytorialnych. 
Płatność 500zł
Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na sylwia@rabbitandfriends.eu do 21czerwca. 
Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać numer telefonu, Twoje imię i nazwisko, imię, wiek i rozmiar ubranka dziecka oraz aktualne zdjęcia buzi i sylwetek.
Na sesje trzeba przeznaczyć ok 3-4godz, w zależności jak sprawnie pójdzie współpraca z kamerzystą 🙂 Jeśli dziecko będzie potrzebować czasu, czy przerwy jesteśmy elastyczne. Byłoby lepiej, gdyby dziecko czuło się swobodnie przed kamerą i było uśmiechnięte, nie wystraszone kamery.

Szukam też dzieci w wieku 3-5, zarówno chłopiec jak i dziewczynka, do drugiej sesji: foto, do tego samego produktu. Już bez Mamy 🙂

Na zdjęciu super Lampka silikonowa Miś Duży z Głośnikiem i Pilotem 🙂 

W razie pytań, proszę pisać na maila.

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)

items.summary:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CAMDEN FRINGE 2026**

Off the Record Theatre is seeking two female actors to join the all-female cast of our debut production, "Un/filtered," for the Camden Fringe this August.

The play is a modern take on Alice Gerstenberg's "Overtones."

Details:
• Performance Dates: Evenings of August 9th, 10th, and 12th

• Basis: profit share

**Required Availability** (Times TBC):
• Sunday, July 5th: Read-through and analysis
• Tuesday, August 4th: Tech rehearsal

**Proposed Rehearsal Dates:**
Rehearsals will be mostly evenings, with potential for daytime sessions on Fridays (subject to space availability). Please flag any unavailable dates/times in your application.
• July: 7th, 8th, 17th, 21st, 24th, 31st
• August: 5th, 7th

Please see character breakdowns and audition sides attached, you may audition for any character however another role may be offered to you. 

**Submission Deadline: Sunday, June 28th.**

*"Dive into a world of unspoken thoughts and hidden desires in this modern twist on Alice Gerstenberg's 'Overtones'. Journey with two estranged friends as they reunite, their outer selves maintaining civility, while their inner selves reveal brutally honest opinions and secret judgments. It's a raw and riveting exploration of female friendship, rivalry, and the concealed thoughts we all carry."*

For more information or to submit your self-tape, please email [offtherecordtheatre@gmail.com](mailto:offtherecordtheatre@gmail.com).

We look forward to seeing your audition!

Best regards,

Laura & Rebecca
Off the Record Theatre

Harriet & Hetty sides:
[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1r1DeChr3rVUCW9tYMUReqYsdgy61FVfW/view?usp=share_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1r1DeChr3rVUCW9tYMUReqYsdgy61FVfW/view?usp=share_link)

Margaret sides:

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ODoPrtpGMotkjUAAkK91ecRRBZ4skpXz/view?usp=share_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ODoPrtpGMotkjUAAkK91ecRRBZ4skpXz/view?usp=share_link)

Maggie sides:

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1XIoIc761Caog-sRfH7HNjwgDZMM1WVwY/view?usp=share_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1XIoIc761Caog-sRfH7HNjwgDZMM1WVwY/view?usp=share_link)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL UN/FILTERED Apsycholoicalcomedythatexplor A psychological comedy that explores the tension between social etiquette and hidden desire. Two women meet up for a coffee years later after a fallout, and while their outward selves engage in polite conversations, their inner selves voice the jealousy, ambition and regrets they conceal. Email: oftherecordtheatre@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL HARRIET HARRIET,30'S( 30'S (F) Wealthy and socially successful woman. Married to a rich ousinessman. Appears elegant, controlled and skilled at maintaining appearances. HETTY,30'S(F) 30'S( (F) Harriet's alter ego. She represents her instinctive and emotional side- she voices feelings that Harriet suppresses: jealously, regret over past choices, resentment towards her husband. Email: oftherecordtheatre@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL MARGARET,30' 30'S （F） Less wealthy and socially prominent than Harriet. Married to a struggling photographer. Appears gentle and polite, a devoted wife. MAGGIE, 30'S F) Margaret's alter ego. She represents her instinctive thoughts and emotional side- she voices feelings that Margaret suppresses: competitiveness, instinct and self- preservation, hidden ambition. Email: offtherecordtheatre@gmail.com'

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

Hi  I’m a London-based presenter, spokesperson and UGC creator with a clear, natural on-camera presence.

I’ve worked across property presenting, vox pop street interviews, product explainers, founder-style content, webinars, UGC ads and social campaigns. 

My style is warm, articulate and trustworthy, with the ability to make complex ideas feel simple, human and easy to understand.

 

Send me an email - tanya@luckyattitude.co.uk

PAID WORK ONLY, happy to travel

media.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎'স্টার ইনস্টিটিউট অফ অ্যকিং স্বপ্ন আপনার, দায়িত্ব আমাদের! বিশেষ অফার: কোর্স চলাকালীন নিশ্চিত কাজের সুযোগ! ভ্র্তি ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- ثث মাসিক ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- অনলাইন এবং অফলাইন কোর্স ১০০% কাজের সুযোগ (ফিচার ফিলা, ওয়েব সিরিজ, সিরিয়াল) থিওুরি এবং প্র্যাটিক্যাল শিক্ষা গুণী শিল্পীদের সান্নিধ্যে প্রশিক্ষণ ভিড় না হারিয়ে, নিজেকে গড়ে তুলুন STAR INSTITUTE ACTING OF ভ্তির জন্য যোগাযোগ করুন E 9432846525 হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: 9432846525‎'‎

🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm
🎞️ Categories:
• Short Film  
• Cross-Cultural Story  
• Student Film  
📍 Bamberg, Germany  
📅 July 25, 2026  
💸 Free submission (o

Stories beyond borders.

I have a movie I really highly recommend watching called special needs revolt this movie displays a wide range of actors from Down syndrome to cp to autism and ect. These characters were actually really fun and colorful to get to play on screen. As an actor with Down syndrome I play the character Billy bates , please watch this power of acting in this movie and leave a review on IMDB and Letterboxd it’s available on Tubi and prime video thank you
#actorlife

Cześć, jestem makijażystą z Warszawy.

Zajmuję się makijażem oraz charakteryzacją. Mam doświadczenie przy różnych stylizacjach i kreatywnych projektach.

Aktualnie szukam pracy, współprac oraz nowych możliwości. Jestem otwarty na różne propozycje.

OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANI EPIZODYŚCI DO ETIUDY STUDENCKIEJ
Do realizacji etiudy studenckiej Katowickiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy osób do małych ról epizodycznych. Szukamy dwóch mężczyzn w wieku od 50 do 70 lat.

📍 Miejsce zdjęć: Katowice i okolice

🗓️ Termin planu zdjęciowego: 20–25 lipca

Jest to projekt non-profit jednak jest to idealna szansa na zdobycie doświadczenia i pracy w przyjaznej atmosferze 

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany udziałem, prześlij:

* imię i nazwisko

* wiek

* kilka zdjęć

* numer telefonu

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy kierować na maila:

atomaszewska297@gmail.com

Zapraszamy do współpracy!

items.text:
CASTING CALL: Westhead

We are casting for THREE main roles for an upcoming short film to be filmed in Salford over 3-4 days in July 2026.

The film will be a part of the University of Salford MA Film Production: Major Project module. Written and directed by Hervey Bracken.

Please read the slides above for information on auditions via self-tape. Please share to actors who may be interested.

Email for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting call Westhead Synopsis: Charlie. a teenage boy, is kicked out of school after a fight. He then must grapple with the repercussions and where he can go next. A film exploring neurodiversity in a UK school system. Filming in Salford/Manchester w/c 13th July-- or --W/c 20th July 2026 University of Salford MA Film Production short film Unpaid role as this is a student project but hoping to offer funds for travel and food. Contact: poemadjacentproductions@gmail.com for more information n auditions via self-tape. Please include character name in subject line. Deadline lune 29th.'

items.text: Monday 29th - NEW ROUTINE! Great time to jump in…… just £3 for your first class!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
🎬 Huge congratulations to our talented adult actor Jonny on securing a role in an upcoming feature film through our talent agency. 

Many of you will also know Jonny as our very own Dewey Finn (Jack Black) in School of Rock. We are incredibly proud of his achievement and can’t wait to see him shine on the big screen and stage.

Why not come and see Jonny live in action at the Storyhouse Theatre, Chester from 13th-15th August as he leads our fantastic cast in School of Rock🎸🤘

Well done, Jonny - here’s to many more exciting opportunities ahead!

#FeatureFilm #SchoolOfRock #StoryhouseTheatre #Chester #MajesticAcademy

items.text:
CASTING CALL
SPIN CYCLE

Student Short Film | Aurora Cinematic Arts Department

Non-Union | Unpaid | Meals Provided

Casting Italian, Italian-American actors for Spin Cycle, a dark crime-horror short film produced through the Aurora Cinematic Arts Department.

This project is intended for actors looking to gain on-set experience, build their reel, and collaborate with other filmmakers.

“In a neighborhood ruled by organized crime, a simple cleanup job leads two wiseguys down a path of secrets, paranoia, and something lurking in their territory.”

SHOOTING LATE AUGUST EARLY SEPTEMBER, DATES TBD

SEEKING:

- JOSEPH CARUSO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 25-35

A capable mob hitman with sharp instincts and a quiet intensity. Joseph is observant, cautious, and far more intelligent than his peers give him credit for.

Lead Role

- CHRIS

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 22-30

Joseph's longtime friend and partner. Quick-witted, sarcastic, and constantly trying to lighten the mood. Chris often serves as comic relief but proves loyal when things become dangerous. A natural talker with strong comedic timing.

Supporting Role

- FRANK PALMIERI

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 55-70

An aging but powerful mafia boss. Frank is intimidating, sharp-tongued, and commands attention the moment he enters a room. He expects competence and has little patience for excuses.

Supporting Role

- MR. TEDESCO

Male | Italian / Italian-American | 50-65

A burly neighborhood figure with a rough exterior and suspicious nature. Tedesco carries himself like someone who has survived a lifetime of street politics. Appears in several key scenes.

Supporting Role

- YOUNG MAN

Male | Italian / Italian-American Preferred | 18-25

A curious and seemingly harmless young man. Charming but slightly suspicious. Limited screen time.

Day Player

- BUTCHER 1

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A nervous worker involved in a gruesome operation. Physical role with minimal dialogue.

Featured Supporting

- BUTCHER 2

Male | Any Ethnicity | 30-55

A silent butcher working behind the scenes of the operation. Intimidating physical presence preferred.

Featured Supporting

- CULT MEMBERS

Male or Female | Any Ethnicity | 18-60

Members of a bizarre underground cult. Physical performers comfortable with stunt-style movement and horror elements are encouraged to submit.

Background / Featured Background

TO SUBMIT

Please send:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Demo Reel (preferred)

• If you do not have a reel, a short monologue is acceptable

Contact

kleverfilms.st@gmail.com

Please include the role(s) you are interested in and any relevant acting experience.

Non-Union • Unpaid • Aurora Cinematic Arts Department Student Production

items.text:
The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

items.text:
Casting Call - NYC Short

ISO of 2 Black men (20s-early 30s) for a dialogue driven short set in a NYC deli, (Harlem, Washington heights or Brooklyn) 

📍NYC Area
🎥Non-Union *independent/solo*
1 Day shoot (approx- 3-5 hours)
🗓️ TBD *iso of delis that would give permission to shoot*
💰Compensation - $100 + meal/snacks, footage, & credit provided. 

Project-
Two stylish NYers debate the Knicks, Jay-Z, Drake, art, legacy and what makes a moment worth remembering while ordering sandwiches at a neighborhood deli before sitting at a bus stop. 

Think: 
Harlem meets Brooklyn 
Tyler, the Creator + A$ap Rocky
Intelligent, funny, conversational
Natural chemistry and improvisational energy encouraged.

Roles:
MALIK (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Creative. Observant. Thoughtful. The kind of person who sees meaning in everything. Speaks with confidence and curiosity. Equal parts film student, poet, and neighborhood philosopher. 

ZION (Lead)
Black male, 20s-early 30s

Charismatic. Sharp. Competitive. Loves sports, music, and a good debate. Grounded, funny, and quick on his feet. The type to challenge every point just because he enjoys the conversation. 

Looking for actors who feel authentic to NYC culture and can move naturally between humor, intellect, and everyday conversations; distinctive fashion style aesthetics of Jordan Poole, Tyrese Haliburton, Devin Booker combined with the freeness/energy of Tyler the Creator.

Submissions: 
Headshot
Resume (if available)
Reel or self-tape 
Social handle (optional)

Can send it to Anaselenax@gmail.com!

items.text:
Documentary Casting:

Looking for some interviews for a documentary! Here's who I'm looking to talk to:

-anyone who had fake social media accounts using their photos
-AI-generated images or videos using their likeness
-Unauthorized use of headshots or promotional images
-Deepfake content
-Voice cloning
-Online impersonation
-Someone using their photos without permission
-Catfishing or identity theft
-Scam attempts involving fake voices or videos
-Harassment involving altered or manipulated images
-Concerns about how AI and digital technology may affect personal privacy
-Concerns about AI scanning, digital replicas, or ownership of their image and likeness

You don't need to have a dramatic story or be involved in a legal case. I'm simply interested in learning how these technologies are affecting people working in the entertainment industry and hearing about personal experiences.

If this sounds like something you've experienced, please send me an email with a little information about yourself and your experience. 

All interviews will take place July 22-24 in Los Angeles. They are one hour long, on camera, and paid. 

Please email me at stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com with a little about yourself and your story. Please no requests for crew or anything else. Thanks!

-Vanessa

items.text:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger
