items.summary:
Hello! We’re looking for actors to play a **few different archetypes** for a series of **comedic chess instructional videos**. Each of these videos will be about two minutes long, and will teach a certain chess concept (like forks, how the pieces move, etc.). These videos are meant, more than anything, to be entertaining to kids, so you don’t need to have a comprehensive understanding of chess – you just need to be awesome in front of the camera (and very comfortable with improv, which will be an integral part of the performance!)

**Archetypes:**

**The Knight**:
* Overly noble, dramatic (can never tell a lie)
* Chess etiquette, honor (saying good game, not knocking pieces off the board etc.)
* Can only move around like a knight on a checkerboard floor.

**Substitute teacher:**
* Barely understands what’s happening
* Mispronounces chess terms confidently
* Accidentally stumbles into brilliant moves
* Tries to maintain control while the board collapses

**Conspiracy theorist**
* Thinks every pawn move is part of a secret government plot
* Has strings and arrows connecting random squares
* Correctly predicts tactics for completely insane reasons
* Believes bishops are “working together”

**Guitar Riff Guy**
* Punctuates explanations with wicked guitar riffs and occasional power chords
* If actor has long hair or uses wig, could be played with hair always obscuring face
* Could be played as “stoner” if no direct references to drugs
* Could play culturally appropriate music to the ethnicity of the particular opening or tactic

**Kind, but Extremely Aggressive Grandma (or Grandpa)**
* Gentle voice, homemade cookies, knits between moves
* Absolutely explodes the board with bombastic tactics.
* “Hold still, dearie. This fork won’t hurt a bit.”
* “Everybody deserves a second chance,” “Really?” “No, not in this position”

**SHOOTING INFO**

**Shooting Days: **We are going to be shooting videos every Sunday from 9 AM to 1 PM, starting most likely in mid July and ending in the distant future. You do not need to commit to all Sundays, since each video will feature at most two archetypes, and the ones listed are not comprehensive.

**Location: **We’ll be shooting in a makeshift studio space most likely at my house, which is in Aurora, right next to Denver.

**Compensation: **We can give you $80.00 per gig, as well as snacks and water on set. You will also get a final edited video for your reel.

**AUDITION INFO**

We will be hosting auditions at the Hilton Garden Inn Denver Tech Center (7675 E Union Ave

Denver, CO 80237) on Sunday, June 28th, from 9 AM to 3 PM. If you are available at that time, kindly sign up here (https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0D49A4AA2DA2F9C25-64447393-chess) and let us know what 10 minute window works best, as well as what archetypes you’d like to audition for (can be more than one).

If you cannot make it during that time, that is totally OK! We also have a remote audition option. If you would like to audition remotely, or if you have any questions, kindly email *jakewunger@gmail.com* and let me know!

Thank you very much!

Jake Unger

[[[[https://jakeunger.carrd.co/](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7Y7JCILWNd3yvE1Nh1rAFsmaii9B1hqP69vEkknXK4PWP1KH964zVA1l7Klg_aem_JSvt9qfa3ilmpl-4Rd-gfw&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4YIVuSRKBgjqgqOt70vL8Wze6e7yp3wDWXf5mVI9G2kw9V4hDNbZPAp41lGg_aem_8lt0y9Th0MenYdO8jRzXeg&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5RfwhAE6cPTf_AfSTOLxPeDNxrb0B-mCTmxEdVxvrnF4P3tgUP1xUULRdJYA_aem_a-jhprZs6s-moP5anA2myA&h=AUDJAez2lbyKljn5b9DB16ZyUiirZzKutiPLzCot-j_gnrh07PlMumJ0u7xVoPr5rG3997kxRv3m5923QPKnPBPa9dVb-itwVIlCi02g7MDtSOHqCussaOGDOKb57GFX6ghm&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDOMufnGfttsbMYDEV8X0hXAcgWXCp45JzSgOhgwjVFBqjSO98PUaPnUMdxyybSVB_c0pdlF-OTnvYYKlCwSKzOtbiP-TBbQCwc7_KrF2Qx_H-TCwO_FenUyxxv2cd4lDwC89OFL5l9Sz0CGZY9VwjpRDXmkyS835zxbU09MWo0uQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fjakeunger.carrd.co%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSFhpSWFVYllocDJBbk5PTXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7s1SxnYbzI353sR61gJPwaj3F9LYMZrMDS-EmcP30gkd9 Hey everyone, I need some extras to take part in a shoot this coming Sunday, June 21st starting at 9am till about 1pm in downtown Denver.

WHAT:  Short film shooting from 9am-1pm.  The scene will be the start of a wedding reception.

WHERE: Downtown Denver.

NEEDED:  5-10 extras, ages 20-50. 

I'll provide a pizza lunch for everyone!  If interested, shoot me an email at brettmanero@gmail.com.  Thanks :)

items.text:
**Gesucht: Männer & Frauen aus Deutschland ab 30 für kurze Handy-Videos – 100 €**

Für ein Werbe-/Contentprojekt im Bereich digitales

Gesundheitsangebot & ärztlich begleitetes Gewichtsmanagement suchen wir authentische Privatpersonen aus Deutschland ab 30 Jahren für kurze Videos im Selfie-Stil.

Wir suchen bewusst keine Fitness-Influencer, Models oder perfekt inszenierten Werbegesichter, sondern normale Menschen mit natürlicher, glaubwürdiger Ausstrahlung.

Worum geht es?
* 1 kurzes Smartphone-Video
* Länge: ca. 15–30 Sekunden
* natürlicher Selfie-Stil
* Text/Briefing wird von uns gestellt
* Aufwand gering
* Vergütung: 100 €

Wichtig:
* Deutschsprachig
* natürliche Ausstrahlung
* keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
* kein professionelles Setup nötig
* aktuelle Fotos oder kurzes Beispielvideo zur Einschätzung 

Besonders passend sind Menschen, die sich glaubwürdig in Themen wie Alltag, Gesundheit, Gewichtsmanagement oder Abnehmen wiederfinden.

Zur Einordnung: Es geht um ein digitales Gesundheitsangebot rund um medizinisch begleitetes Abnehmen. Persönliche Behandlungserfahrungen sollen nur genannt werden, wenn sie wirklich vorhanden sind. Alternativ sind auch gescriptete Info-/Werbevideos möglich, ohne dass eine eigene Behandlungserfahrung behauptet wird.

Bei Interesse bitte melden mit:
* Vorname
* Alter
* Wohnort
* aktuellem Foto
* optional kurzem Beispielvideo / Sprachaufnahme
* kurzer Info, ob eigene Erfahrung mit Gewichtsmanagement / Abnehm-Themen vorhanden ist

topComments.text: Hallo. Ich habe großes Interesse und würde gerne teilnehmen. Wohin darf ich meine Angaben bzw. Fotos usw. hinschicken? Liebe Grüße Daniel

items.text:
🎬 CREW CALL – UNSPOKEN RHYTHMS 🎬

Für unseren geplanten Kurzfilm „UNSPOKEN RHYTHMS“ suchen wir aktuell engagierte Crew-Mitglieder, die Teil eines besonderen Filmprojekts werden möchten.

UNSPOKEN RHYTHMS ist ein bewegungsbasiertes Drama über Verlust, Identität, Erinnerung und die Kraft von Tanz als nonverbale Sprache. Im Mittelpunkt stehen die junge Tänzerin Titi und die ehemalige Profitänzerin Tammy, deren Lebenswege sich auf unerwartete Weise kreuzen.

🎥 Aktuell suchen wir unter anderem:

• Kameramann / Director of Photography (DoP)• Kameraassistenz (1st AC / 2nd AC)• Setrunner / Produktionsassistenz• Aufnahmeleitung• Regieassistenz• Tonassistenz• Lichtassistenz• Making-of-Fotograf• Behind-the-Scenes Content Creator• Produktionshelfer• Fahrer / Transportassistenz• Setbetreuung• Requisitenassistenz• Kostümassistenz• Maske & Styling• Script Continuity• Social Media & Produktionsdokumentation• Weitere unterstützende Crew-Positionen

Gesucht werden motivierte, zuverlässige und kreative Persönlichkeiten, die Freude daran haben, gemeinsam eine emotionale Geschichte auf die Leinwand zu bringen. Erfahrung ist willkommen, jedoch sind auch engagierte Nachwuchstalente herzlich eingeladen, sich zu bewerben.

📍 NRW, Deutschland📅 Geplanter Drehzeitraum: Oktober 2026🎬 Produktion: Diaspora Films / Edy Production Studios

Der Film behandelt Themen wie Inklusion, Trauma, Heilung, Familie, zweite Chancen und die verbindende Kraft von Kunst und Bewegung.

Als unabhängige Produktion befinden wir uns aktuell in der Finanzierungs- und Vorbereitungsphase. Daher freuen wir uns besonders über Menschen, die Lust haben, Teil eines kreativen Projekts mit gesellschaftlicher Relevanz zu werden und gemeinsam etwas Besonderes entstehen zu lassen.

📩 Bewerbung und Kontakt:edyproductionstudios@outlook.com

Wir freuen uns auf engagierte Menschen vor und hinter der Kamera und darauf, gemeinsam eine besondere Geschichte zum Leben zu erwecken.

Produktion:Diaspora Films / Edy Production Studios

Independent / Low Budget Production

items.text:
Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!

TITANIC AUDITIONS ARE IN ONE WEEK, COME AUDITION!

In Person Auditions: June 22 & 23 (5-8pm), At The Avon Free Public Library; 281 Country Club Road Avon, CT 06001, Board Room, 2nd Floor. Or Online Submission.

Come audition for the story about what happened on the Titanic. This special immersive production will be held in beautiful outdoor nautical gardens. All roles open, everyone is welcome to audition.

Rehearsals: July 7 July 8, July 12, July 21. July 22, July 28, July 29, August 4, August 5, August 9, & August 11 - 5:00 pm - 8:00 pm / Till Dusk, at 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032 (Outside Venue.)

Performance Date: August 16, 2pm. Performance Space: 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032. Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided.

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

# **Acting Headshot Day - Manchester**

Hi,

I'm currently finalising an Acting Headshot Day in Manchester for the next couple of weeks, with a few performers already lined up.

I'll be working with a limited number of actors on the day to keep each session creative and tailored, with a focus on creating a range of strong, castable looks that showcase different characters and casting types.

I have a couple of remaining spaces available. If you're due a headshot update or looking to broaden your casting range, feel free to comment below or send me a DM for details.

Andrej

[https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk](https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk)

items.text:
🌟 SEARCH FOR A STAR WITH KERRY ELLIS! 🌟
Are you a talented young performer who would love the opportunity to take to the stage?

West End star Kerry Ellis and the Perform Now team have an incredible opportunity that you won’t want to miss!

🎤 We are searching for one outstanding solo performer to take to the stage during Kerry Ellis’ “Rock Anthems” Tour.

This is your chance to perform in front of a live audience and showcase your talent alongside one of musical theatre’s leading stars.

✨ Think you’ve got what it takes?

Find out more and enter now at:

www.performnow.co.uk⁠￼

Kerry will also be teaching and scouting at our ICONS week 10-14th August ArtsEd LONDOM 

Good luck from all of us at Perform Now and Kerry Ellis! 🍀

#PerformNow #SearchForAStar #KerryEllis #YoungTalent #YoungPerformers #MusicalTheatre #StageStars #WestEnd #PerformingArts

Did you know - 

In June of 1971, Carole King began a 15 week run at #1 with her iconic album, Tapestry?

Find out how she came to write this album, and so many other hits, THIS WEEK in Beautiful; The Carole King Musical

Ticket link here: https://www.darlingharbour.com/whats-on/events/beautiful-the-carole-king-musical 

https://americansongwriter.com/on-this-day-in-1971-carole-king-started-a-15-week-stay-at-no-1-with-one-of-the-greatest-albums-of-all-time/

items.text:
Hello!

We are still casting FEMALE IDENTIFYING ACTORS (40s-60s) who are LOCAL to EAU CLAIRE, WI for a non-union feature shooting this fall entitled **Missing Cody**. *Please only submit if you fit this criteria.*

**Logline: **After the unexpected passing of her parents, a runaway is forced back to her childhood home, reuniting with her estranged siblings to pay off their parents’ debts.

**MISS GENEVIEVE LACORTE (40s-60s, F) FEATURED**

The neighborhood mom - you know the type that makes casseroles for her neighbors. A sweet, material figure who helps Margot through troubles.

If you are interested, please contact missingcodycasting@gmail.com with a headshot, and we will be in touch if we would like to see you!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – "Million Dollar Personality Girl/Boy" (Short Film) 🎬
We are seeking a talented actor with exceptional range for an upcoming artistic short film, "Million Dollar Personality Boy / Girl" (MDPG), set in 1930s Hollywood and scheduled to film this summer.

Role:

BILL "BOJANGLES" ROBINSON

Male/Female African American, Ages 30–60

A legendary tap dancer whose remarkable success cannot shield him from the racial prejudices of the era.

Project Concept:

The film features a brief but powerful conversation between Bill "Bojangles" Robinson and Jeni Le Gon, the first African American woman to sign a long-term contract with a major Hollywood studio. Together, they discuss the challenges and triumphs of Black artists navigating 1930s Hollywood.

Production Details:

Genre: Drama

Location: in 

Shoot Dates: Two-day weekend shoot, July 2026 (Exact dates TBD)

One filming location

Compensation: $750 flat rate

IMDb Credit, Meal, and Reel Footage Included

Preferred Qualifications:

Tap dancing experience is a plus (very light choreography required)

Strong acting ability is the primary focus

This is a unique opportunity to portray an iconic figure in Black entertainment history and showcase your talent in a meaningful and memorable role.

To Submit:

Please send your headshot, resume, and reel to:

SteaDr7@gmail.com

Subject Line: BILL SUBMISSION

Questions, recommendations, and referrals are always appreciated.

We look forward to hearing from you! 🎥✨

items.text:
CASTING CALL
For a SCAD senior thesis titled “SHOOTOUT”

It will be filming October 22nd-25th in Savannah, GA

It is paid (amount depends on character) 

Please read each character description as they do have requirements!

If interested please check out the sides at sophidarlingcasting.com or email sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of hockey and text that says 'SHOOTOUT SHOOTING OCT 22ND-OCT 25TH SAVANNAH,GA WHEN THE THE CAPTAIN OF THE HOCKEY TEAM SUSTAINS A CAREER ENDING INJURY HOW FAR WILL SHE GO TO GET HER FINAL SHOT'

May be an image of text that says 'NICOLE BLACKWELL LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY NICOLE IS THE CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND FIONA'S WIFE. SHE IS OVERCONFIDENT, SPORTED, AND BELIEVES SHE HAS TO BE THE BEST. SHE'S BEEN SECRETLY BATTLING A KNEE INJURY SHE HAS TOLD NOBODY ABOUT AND AS A RESULT, SHE BECAME OBSESSED WITH WINNING THE COYNE CUP. SHE UNDERSTANDS WITHOUT THE SURGERY HER CAREER WILL END PREMATURELY, BUT SHE PUSHES BACK BECAUSE SHE IS AFRAID THAT SHE'LL NEVER BE THE SAME PLAYER.'

May be an image of hockey and text that says 'FIONA SALO LEAD 28-36 YEARS OLD WOMAN $200/DAY SHE'S THE ASSIST CAPTAIN OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS AND NICOLE'S WIFE ANO TEAMMATE. SHE'S SOFT SPOKEN, BUT ON THE ICE, SHE IS DOMINANT AND LOUO. FIONA CARES DEEPLY FOR HER WIFE ANO TEAM ANO CAN BRING ANYONE DOWN FROM AN EMOTIONAL OUTBURST. SHE'S USUALLY PRETTY PERCEPTIVE AND NOTICES NICOLE CHANGES IN BEHAVIOR SHE GOES INTO PROTECTIVE MODE WANTING TO SAVE NICOLE FROM HER DESTRUCTIVE TENDENCIES.'

May be an image of basketball and text that says 'COACH BRUCE SUPPORTING 50 60 YEARS OLD WOMAN $150/DAY SHE IS A A FORMER STANDOUT PLAYER AND CURRENT HEAD COACH OF THE ATLANTA ICE DRAGONS. SHE WAS VERY SIMILAR TO NICOLE IN HER PLAYING DAYS, NEEDING TO BE THE BEST IN THE TEAM NO MATTER WHAT. AS THE HEAD COACH, SHE'S A NO NONSENSE WOMAN AND THRIVES FOR HER TEAM TO PLAY HARD AND SUPPORT ACH OTHER. SHE IS SECRETLY AWARE OF NICOLE'S INJURY.'

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

Check out Bill Wood, Cameron Krauth and Juri Love in one of the spots!!

media.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎'স্টার ইনস্টিটিউট অফ অ্যকিং স্বপ্ন আপনার, দায়িত্ব আমাদের! বিশেষ অফার: কোর্স চলাকালীন নিশ্চিত কাজের সুযোগ! ভ্র্তি ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- ثث মাসিক ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- অনলাইন এবং অফলাইন কোর্স ১০০% কাজের সুযোগ (ফিচার ফিলা, ওয়েব সিরিজ, সিরিয়াল) থিওুরি এবং প্র্যাটিক্যাল শিক্ষা গুণী শিল্পীদের সান্নিধ্যে প্রশিক্ষণ ভিড় না হারিয়ে, নিজেকে গড়ে তুলুন STAR INSTITUTE ACTING OF ভ্তির জন্য যোগাযোগ করুন E 9432846525 হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: 9432846525‎'‎

items.text:
Tonight is a very proud moment🎬

As a Mum/Agent, I couldn’t be prouder to be attending the London screening of *Angel of the North* this evening.

Knowing that Summer-Joules played the supporting lead role of Lucy makes this occasion incredibly special for us. Her hard work, dedication, and commitment to her acting journey have led to this wonderful milestone, and I am so excited to celebrate alongside the amazing talented cast, crew, and creative team behind the film.

A special thank you to Sean, whose talent, vision, and dedication brought *Angel of the North* to life. Not only did he direct this incredible film, but he also delivered a wonderful performance within it. It was a privilege for Summer-Joules to work alongside someone so passionate and committed to their craft. Sean's support, guidance, and belief in his cast helped create a truly memorable experience, and we're incredibly grateful to have been part of his journey with this film.

Wishing everyone involved a fantastic screening tonight. Here’s to an unforgettable evening and the continued success of *Angel of the North*.

#AngelOfTheNorth #LondonScreening #FilmPremiere #ProudMum #SupportingLead

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: East London

If fate handed you an inventory slot, what would you grab? A prop sword, a healing potion, or studio lights to bathe you mates?

This October, JDG presents a charity spectacular built around Master Jonjon's inventive new play: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…". Find out what the story's about: cutt.ly/GFGstory

But here's the glorious part: you can be in it. Sign up: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

Starting early July, we're throwing open the doors to free masterclass workshop rehearsals. Whether you're a seasoned pro or trying something new, you belong here. Wander between departments, crash other people's workshops, build your showreel, learn something new, and meet other drama enthusiasts.

Backstage and cast roles are open. We're hunting for:
Director
Assistant Director
Stage Manager
Assistant Stage Manager
Designer
Sound Designer
Multimedia Designer
Multimedia Operator
Lighting Designer
Lighting Tech
Costume Designer
Props Designer
Set Designer
Front of House Manager
Assistant Front of House Manager
Director of Photography (Photography & Video Recording)

Sign up for your audition: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

The spotlight's on. Let the magic begin.

items.title: Both creative and cast roles are now open:

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Pukar Casting is officially seeking lead performers for the upcoming short film, “Lanterns in the Night”. 

If you are interested in being part of this story, please reach out!

Email: pukarcasting@gmail.com

Include: 2 recent photos (a close-up and a full-body shot) and any links to previous work (if available).

Deadline for submissions: Before 20 June 2026.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm
🎞️ Categories:
• Short Film  
• Cross-Cultural Story  
• Student Film  
📍 Bamberg, Germany  
📅 July 25, 2026
